title: Gannt Widget in Dashboards in Chronological Order
excerpt:
We have several Gannt style schedules that I have created a dashboard for. When I combine the schedules in the widget the timelines are out of order, even though they are in chronological order in the parent boards 
  
.…

posts.author: PhillAllen (Phill Allen)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have several Gannt style schedules that I have created a dashboard for. When I combine the schedules in the widget the timelines are out of order, even though they are in chronological order in the parent boards

Presentation11280×720 119 KB

. It would be nice to see them in chronological order Can

posts.author: PhillAllen (Phill Allen)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have two boards that I connected to the Gantt widget and no matter what I try I cannot get the groups to show in a chronological order. Am I missing something?

Monday Chrono1295×575 69.4 KB

posts.author: nperfito (Nicole Perfito)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is similar to another feature request here: Gantt Chart - Sort "Group by" by date

You might want to combine this info so it has more votes!

posts.author: Ilona (Ili)
posts.cookedHtml: hi Monday, please this is super important for planning!

posts.author: Filipe (Filipe Fermiano Pereira)
posts.cookedHtml: Please this function is very important for the management

posts.author: Ilona (Ili)
posts.cookedHtml: hey Monday, it been now one year, without this feature a big portfolio with more than 100 items (we have games) can not be tracked… Monday.com is not good for big companies with big portfolio… I think we have to chose JIRA, it is ugly, but at least functioning and stable…

posts.author: thomasgaillard (Thomas Gaillard)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, it could be great to be able to sort projects in a Gantt widget by actual start date (based on a timeline column) or also by actual end date (timeline)!!!
